meetings.notes:
History: 30 years sick (chemical exposures + Long Covid). 'Vaccine injury' discussion. 

Metabolic Status: 'Torpor' confirmed. Pulse ~49-55 bpm, Temp ~96F. Fingers get stuck/joint pain (gout/RA like).

Dietary Paradox: Feels '1000x better' on carbs (energy returns) but lipids/cholesterol worsen. Ketovore/Carnivore causes fatigue return.

Plan: Prioritize raising BMR (Basal Metabolic Rate) over fasting for now. T3 + TUDCA + B1 key.
